description: The Shortcuts campaign. The L5 golden sitting (2026-07-09) built six proxies and captured FIRST verdicts via lab/scripts/l5-consent-absorb.sh (evidence: docs/lab/s-campaign-results.md, raw lab/artifacts/l5-sitting-20260709/). This JSON is the intended RECURRING regression form — NOT yet auto-runnable: the runner/DSL needs Shortcuts-vector support (write the JSON input to a guest file and invoke `shortcuts run <proxy> --input-path <file>` — NOT inline `-i`; the `shortcuts` CLI takes a path or stdin). Proxies address by uuid via Find Items' ID filter + Find->act chains. CONSENT CONSTRAINT (oddities 5j): output-class proxies (create-heading/edit-title/set-detail/find-items) are Always-Allowed = headless in clones; delete-class proxies (delete-items/delete-items-permanently) have NO Always-Allow and re-prompt EVERY run — they cannot ride autonomous lab:regress and need a human click or SIP-off consent-DB seeding. Verdicts below are LOCKED from the L5 first-run unless marked otherwise.

probes.title: find-items read probe — structured output carries the item TITLE (text), not the uuid (L5 verdict)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S01-FINDME'

commands.note: PENDING runner support — run: printf '{"search":"S01-FINDME"}' > in.json; shortcuts run things-proxy-find-items --input-path in.json --output-path out.txt; assert out.txt contains 'S01-FINDME'

probes.title: HEADING CREATE in an existing project — WORKS (L5 S02): Create Heading makes a type=2 row with project=<uuid>

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S02-PROJ' AND type=1

commands.note: PENDING runner support — input {"title":"S02-HEAD","project":"<uuid:S02-PROJ>"}; then assert a type=2 row titled S02-HEAD with project=<uuid:S02-PROJ>

probes.title: HEADING RENAME — WORKS (L5 S03): Edit Items -> Set Title renames the type=2 row in place
HEADING DELETE — WORKS (L5 S04): removes the heading row (headings don't sit in Trash). DELETE-CLASS = interactive, re-prompts each run.

commands.note: PENDING + INTERACTIVE — needs a human Delete click; re-probe: child re-parenting on a NON-empty heading (L5 heading was empty)

probes.title: set-detail (generic Edit Items) — Reminder Time INCONCLUSIVE on an unscheduled to-do (L5); re-probe on a SCHEDULED fixture + the dated-reminder CLEAR path (oddity 2e)

commands.note: PENDING — probe Reminder Time on a scheduled item; Parent (heading move?); Completion/Creation Date (backdating — no other surface writes these)

probes.title: PERMANENT single-item delete — WORKS (L5 S-delperm): Delete Immediately hard-deletes one row, NO tombstone. DELETE-CLASS = interactive.

commands.note: PENDING + INTERACTIVE — needs a human Delete click. Verified: row 1->0, tombstones 0 (oddity 5i)

probes.title: to-do -> project conversion — DEAD (no Convert action exists in the Shortcuts catalog; L5 sweep). Closed without a probe.

commands.note: no proxy — the Things Shortcuts action catalog has no Convert action
